4040.issue: [W4040] Missing schema definition for "io-package.json" in .vscode/settings.json. Add: {"fileMatch": ["io-package.json"], "url": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.js-controller/master/schemas/io-package.json"}

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/inventwo/ioBroker.vis-2-widgets-inventwo/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-widgets/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"
